summary: First test run of HikmabyLM app. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI renders correctly across all 5 tabs. Registration and login flows work end-to-end. Dark Spotify-style design with #04D182 accent is properly implemented.

react_native_issues.issue: style.resizeMode is deprecated, use props.resizeMode (non-breaking warning)
expo-av deprecated, should migrate to expo-audio/expo-video in future SDK upgrade (non-breaking)

action_items: Minor: Replace style.resizeMode with props.resizeMode in Image components
Future: Migrate from expo-av to expo-audio/expo-video when upgrading to SDK 54
critical_code_review_comments: EXPO_BACKEND_URL not present in frontend/.env - only EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is defined. Ensure AuthContext uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL)
seed_data_creation: TEST_tester@hikma.com user created during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: App fully working. All screens render: login, register, home (hero/recommendations/scholar/daily pick), explorer (search+filters+grid), bibliothèque (3 tabs), live sessions, profil (stats+logout). R2 bucket accessible. Backend 15/15 tests pass.
